summary: The diff implements the majority of REQ-31's requirements: the useSubmitPayment mutation in useQueries.ts is gated with an actor-readiness guard, exposes isActorReady, and retries up to 2 times with exponential back-off for transient errors. PaymentForm.tsx disables the submit button (with a spinner and 'Connecting...' label) and shows a banner while the actor is initializing. The success/confirmation screen is retained. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
